title: LLM-Assisted Analysis of On-Chip Protocol Implementations
authors: Melisande Zonta-Roudes, Nora Hinderling, Supraja Sridhara, Srinidhi Nagendra, Shweta Shinde
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: Hardware designs comprise many IP blocks that must communicate over rigorously specified on-chip protocols. These protocols regulate not only functionality but also cycle-accurate timing and ordering. Even a single cycle deviation can become a permanent silicon fault with functional consequences (e.g., execution integrity, denial of service). To verify and validate these critical protocol implementations, existing tools use assertion-based verification (ABV) and formal methods. As input, these approaches require properties that need to be extracted from long, natural-language specifications and adapted to a given implementation-under-test. Currently, engineers perform this property generation manually, making it slow and error-prone, and hindering the ability to determine whether implementations adhere to specifications or exhibit violations.
title_zh: 基于LLM辅助的片上协议实现分析
abstract_zh: 硬件设计包含许多IP模块，这些模块必须通过严格规定的片上协议进行通信。这些协议不仅规范功能，还规定了周期精确的时序和顺序。即使是一个周期的偏差，也可能导致永久性的硅故障，并产生功能性后果（例如，执行完整性问题、服务拒绝）。为了验证和确认这些关键协议的实现，现有工具使用基于断言的验证（ABV）和形式化方法。这些方法需要从冗长的自然语言规范中提取属性，并根据待测试的具体实现进行调整。目前，工程师手动执行属性生成，这种方式既缓慢又容易出错，从而阻碍了确定实现是否符合规范或是否存在违规行为的能力。

title: LENS-HLS: LLM-Enhanced Learning-based Design Space Exploration for High-Level Synthesis
authors: Yujie Yan, Guanhua Chen, Keren Zhu
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) improves hardware productivity by translating C/C++ programs into RTL implementations [1] . However, the quality of HLS designs strongly depends on pragma configurations such as loop pipelining, unrolling, and tiling. Since the pragma space is typically sparse, high-dimensional, and highly nonlinear, efficient design space exploration (DSE) remains challenging.
title_zh: LENS-HLS：基于LLM增强的高层次综合设计空间探索
abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）通过将C/C++程序转换为RTL实现来提高硬件生产力[1]。然而，HLS设计的质量在很大程度上取决于诸如循环流水线、展开和分块等pragma配置。由于pragma空间通常是稀疏的、高维的且高度非线性的，高效的设计空间探索（DSE）仍然是一个挑战。
